Package org.eventb.pp

package org.eventb.pp

    Description

  • Class
    Description
    AbstractRodinTest
    Common implementation for validation tests of the new Predicate Prover based on lemmas coming form the Rodin platform.
    AbstractRodinTest.TestItem
     
    CancellationTests
    Ensures that prover cancellation is correctly handled by PP.
    CancellationTests.ProofMonitor
    Simple proof monitor.
    HypothesisSensitivity
    Tests about the new Predicate Prover sensitivity about superfluous hypotheses, as exposed in Feature Request #1949927.
    IPPMonitor
    Common protocol for monitoring a Predicate Prover proof.
    ITracer
    A tracer that keeps track of what formulas are needed to get to the proof.
    PPCore
     
    PPProof
    This class is responsible for running PP on a given set of hypotheses and a goal.
    PPResult
    Result of a PP run.
    PPResult.Result
    The result of a run.
    ReasonerExtensionTests
     
    RodinTests
     
    SeedSearchProblem
    Tests about the new Predicate Prover instantiating two many clauses during seed search.
    TestSequent
    Implements a typed sequent for use in tests.
